title: k@ruwb #3742
definition:
1) cherub, cherubim (pl)
    1a) an angelic being
        1a1) as guardians of Eden
        1a2) as flanking God's throne
        1a3) as an image form hovering over the Ark of the Covenant
        1a4) as the chariot of Jehovah (fig.)
nasbUsage:
